what_it_does: Registers a DNA.gallery module named rail that renders a searchable, collapsible category/group/piece rail, a horizontal title skim strip, a My-notes feedback summary panel, and a shelf of bench-grown artifacts, using state from ctx and several global functions.
observations: Module is registered via global.DNA.gallery.register('rail', { init: ... }) inside an IIFE.
It reads manifest categories/groups and mockups from ctx getters and renders them into #list.
Open/closed state for categories and groups is stored in localStorage under dna-rail-open-cats and dna-rail-open-groups.
A search query forces all categories and groups to expand and filters pieces by title, note, id, and group name.
Piece thumbnails are live iframes pointing at the latest version file, scaled to 46px height using dimensions from canvasOf(m).
The skim strip renders every mockup title as a button and scrolls the current one into view.
The summary panel aggregates ctx.feedback() per mockup: preferred version, verdict, note, and sorted comments.
Bench-grown items are fetched from /api/grown and shown as a 'Grown on the bench' shelf when not searching.
It exposes buildList, buildSkim, railEnsureVisible, openSummary, closeSummary, and ctx.loadGrown as global shims.
standouts: Live iframe thumbnails scaled per-canvas rather than static images.
Collapse memory persisted per user in localStorage.
Bench-grown shelf embedded directly in the gallery rail.
conventions: IIFE module registration pattern with dependency injection through ctx.
Global shims for HTML attribute callbacks and external callers.
HTML escaping via ctx.esc and DNA.esc.
Defensive fallbacks: 'Everything' pseudo-category and 'Unsorted' orphan bucket.
concerns: Relies on undeclared globals: select, canvasOf, DNA.esc, DNA.rooms.navigate.
Iframe src is set directly from mockup version file path without visible sanitization.
Assigns ctx.loadGrown as a side effect inside init.
notes: This file is the gallery rail UI renderer: it turns manifest, mockup, and feedback state into a navigable, searchable, collapsible list, a skim strip, and a notes summary, while persisting fold state in localStorage.
questions: What is the exact shape of ctx.manifest() categories, groups, and pending entries?
Where are select, canvasOf, DNA.esc, and DNA.rooms.navigate defined?
What does applyTokens do and where is it defined?
What fields does a grown item spec contain beyond root, brief/subject, and kept?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches the stated purpose: it implements the pieces rail, skim strip, summary, ghost cards, and bench-grown shelf.
apparent_themes: Progressive disclosure with user-controlled fold state.
Tight coupling between browsing and generation artifacts.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to make a large catalog of design pieces quickly scannable and reviewable, while keeping generated artifacts and user notes within the same navigation surface.
novelty: Embedding a live-generated 'grown on the bench' shelf inside the gallery rail and using per-canvas-scaled iframe thumbnails for live previews.
contribution: Provides the rail browsing UI: category/group/piece rendering, search filtering, collapse persistence, live thumbnails, title skim strip, feedback summary panel, and integration of bench-grown artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: A gallery rail UI module that renders a searchable, collapsible hierarchy of design pieces with live thumbnails, a title skim strip, a feedback summary panel, and a shelf of bench-grown artifacts.
intention_for_embedding: To let users browse, search, and review design pieces and their notes while preserving UI fold state and surfacing newly generated artifacts.

symbols.description: A tiny wrapper around document.getElementById used throughout the module to grab rail UI elements by id.

symbols.does: Persists currently open categories and groups to localStorage.
symbols.description: Serializes the openCats and openGroups sets into JSON and writes them under dna-rail-open-cats and dna-rail-open-groups so fold state survives reloads.

symbols.does: Opens the category and group containing a given mockup.
symbols.description: Looks up the category for a mockup's group and adds both category and group to the open sets, persisting if changed, so the selection is not hidden inside collapsed sections.

symbols.does: Builds a scaled live iframe thumbnail for a mockup.
symbols.description: Computes scale from canvas dimensions and returns an iframe loading the latest version file lazily, with applyTokens called on load.

symbols.does: Builds the inner HTML for a rail list item.
symbols.description: Combines the thumbnail with title, note, dial metadata, and version count for a single piece in the rail.

symbols.does: Renders the full categorized rail list and bench-grown shelf.
symbols.description: Walks categories/groups, filters by search query, renders collapsible headers and items, handles empty search state, and appends grown-on-bench entries when not searching.

symbols.does: Fetches bench-grown artifacts from the server.
symbols.description: Async function that loads /api/grown into the file-local grownList for display in the rail shelf.

symbols.does: Renders the horizontal title skim strip.
symbols.description: Creates a row of title buttons highlighting the current selection and scrolls the active one into view.

symbols.does: Opens and populates the My-notes summary panel.
symbols.description: Reads feedback state for each mockup and builds a panel showing save time, preferred version, verdict, notes, and sorted comments.
Removes the show class from the summary element to close the My-notes overlay.
